logger.message: Fetching outage information with filters: customerId=#[vars.customerId], location=(#[vars.latitude], #[vars.longitude]), radius=#[vars.radius]

db:select.doc:name: Get Customer Location
db:select.db:sql: SELECT service_latitude, service_longitude FROM customers WHERE customer_id = :customerId

http:request.doc:name: Get Customer Area Outages

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Customer not found", "message": "Unable to find location for customer " ++ vars.customerId }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Outage management system unavailable", "message": "Unable to retrieve outage information at this time" }

logger.message: Getting outages for location: (#[vars.latitude], #[vars.longitude]) with radius: #[vars.radius default 10]

http:request.doc:name: Get Area Outages

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Outage not found", "message": "Outage with ID " ++ attributes.uriParams.outageId ++ " not found" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Outage not found", "message": "Outage with ID " ++ attributes.uriParams.outageId ++ " not found" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Outage management system error", "message": "Unable to retrieve outage information" }
